name: Fuze Wash Z120

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: D61CE99F-0A22-4159-94CB-F0A5F456EBEC

comment: The FUZE WASH Z120™ is a single source par moving head luminaire with a 120W Quad Color RGBW COB LED. Features 7° to 55° motorized zoom, pan and tilt, RGBW color mixing, electronic strobe and selectable dimming curve effects, DMX and RDM (remote device management) protocol support, DMX and power in/out connections, LCD menu display with 7 button control panel, multiple unit power linking, flicker free operation for TV and FILM, and a multi-voltage universal auto switching power supply (110-240v).

capabilities.comment: Counter Clockwise Movement fast to slow

gwSpecs.description: The FUZE WASH Z120™ is a single source par moving head luminaire with a 120W Quad Color RGBW COB LED. Features 7° to 55° motorized zoom, pan and tilt, RGBW color mixing, electronic strobe and selectable dimming curve effects, DMX and RDM (remote device management) protocol support, DMX and power in/out connections, LCD menu display with 7 button control panel, multiple unit power linking, flicker free operation for TV and FILM, and a multi-voltage universal auto switching power supply (110-240v).
